import asyncio
from source import run_race

def test_concurrent_increments_are_atomic():
    result = asyncio.run(run_race())
    assert result == 50, (
        f"Expected counter to be 50 after 50 concurrent increments, "
        f"got {result} — race condition: tasks read stale count before any write completes"
    )
